title: Ground Clear
description: Configurable automatic ground item clearing for Minecraft servers.
body:
# GroundClear

GroundClear is a lightweight server utility mod that automatically clears dropped ground items on a configurable timer.

It is made for server owners who want a simple way to reduce item buildup without installing a large performance or administration mod.

## Features

- Automatically clears dropped ground items
- Configurable clear interval
- Configurable countdown warnings
- Option to disable announcements
- Manual clear command
- Config reload command
- Status command
- Minimum item age protection
- Ignored item and world lists
- Named item protection
- Simple JSON config

## Default Behavior

By default, GroundClear clears dropped ground items every 10 minutes.

Warnings are sent at:

- 5 minutes
- 2 minutes
- 1 minute
- 30 seconds

Items must be at least 60 seconds old before automatic cleanup removes them.

## Commands

Commands require OP permission level 2 by default.

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/groundclear status` | Shows whether GroundClear is enabled and when the next clear will happen. |
| `/groundclear now` | Immediately clears dropped ground items. |
| `/groundclear reload` | Reloads the config without restarting the server. |

## Configuration

GroundClear creates a config file after the server starts at `config/groundclear.json`.

For setup instructions, command usage, config options, and examples, visit the **[GroundClear Documentation](https://groundclear.pages.dev)**.

Additional Minecraft versions and mod loaders may be added in future releases.

Always download the file that matches your Minecraft version and mod loader.

## Modpack Usage

You may include GroundClear in modpacks.
